title: CDP EvalAsync Retry and Inspected Target Reconnect
desc: CdpClient retry policy for timeout and Inspected target disconnect
steps: Timeout or cancel under 2 attempts: delay then retry
Inspected target disconnect: EnsureConnectedAsync then replay

requirements.expect: retries up to 2x on timeout before failing
reconnects automatically on Inspected target error
WebSocket closed error triggers reconnect and single replay

author: claude
